title: Flying Fox
description: Joke mod. There are foxes that can fly with their tails! Chickens and rabbits beware!
body:
Description

Joke mod. There are foxes that can fly with their tails! Chickens and rabbits beware!

 

 

 Chicken being attacked by Flying Fox. Discolored.

 

If you rename the foxes with the name "tails" something happens...

Support

Suggestion and Support here! >Here!

Issue Tracker here!

 

News?!

Right now, nothing. Go to discord if you want to suggest anything to me. ^^
